verses.arabicText: ۞ قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.translationText: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers?"

verses.arabicText: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍۢ مُّجْرِمِينَ
verses.translationText: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals

verses.arabicText: لِنُرْسِلَ عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةًۭ مِّن طِينٍۢ
verses.translationText: To send down upon them stones of clay,

verses.arabicText: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُسْرِفِينَ
verses.translationText: Marked in the presence of your Lord for the transgressors."

verses.arabicText: فَأَخْرَجْنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.translationText: So We brought out whoever was in the cities of the believers.

verses.arabicText: فَمَا وَجَدْنَا فِيهَا غَيْرَ بَيْتٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
verses.translationText: And We found not within them other than a [single] house of Muslims.

verses.arabicText: وَتَرَكْنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَةًۭ لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
verses.translationText: And We left therein a sign for those who fear the painful punishment.

verses.arabicText: وَفِى مُوسَىٰٓ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ بِسُلْطَٰنٍۢ مُّبِينٍۢ
verses.translationText: And in Moses [was a sign], when We sent him to Pharaoh with clear authority.

verses.arabicText: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكْنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَٰحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌۭ
verses.translationText: But he turned away with his supporters and said," A magician or a madman."

verses.arabicText: فَأَخَذْنَٰهُ وَجُنُودَهُۥ فَنَبَذْنَٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌۭ
verses.translationText: So We took him and his soldiers and cast them into the sea, and he was blameworthy.

verses.arabicText: وَفِى عَادٍ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلرِّيحَ ٱلْعَقِيمَ
verses.translationText: And in 'Aad [was a sign], when We sent against them the barren wind.

verses.arabicText: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَىْءٍ أَتَتْ عَلَيْهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتْهُ كَٱلرَّمِيمِ
verses.translationText: It left nothing of what it came upon but that it made it like disintegrated ruins.

verses.arabicText: وَفِى ثَمُودَ إِذْ قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَمَتَّعُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍۢ
verses.translationText: And in Thamud, when it was said to them, "Enjoy yourselves for a time."

verses.arabicText: فَعَتَوْا۟ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّٰعِقَةُ وَهُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.translationText: But they were insolent toward the command of their Lord, so the thunderbolt seized them while they were looking on.

verses.arabicText: فَمَا ٱسْتَطَٰعُوا۟ مِن قِيَامٍۢ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنتَصِرِينَ
verses.translationText: And they were unable to arise, nor could they defend themselves.

verses.arabicText: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍۢ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًۭا فَٰسِقِينَ
verses.translationText: And [We destroyed] the people of Noah before; indeed, they were a people defiantly disobedient.

verses.arabicText: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بَنَيْنَٰهَا بِأَيْي۟دٍۢ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ
verses.translationText: And the heaven We constructed with strength, and indeed, We are [its] expander.

verses.arabicText: وَٱلْأَرْضَ فَرَشْنَٰهَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْمَٰهِدُونَ
verses.translationText: And the earth We have spread out, and excellent is the preparer.

verses.arabicText: وَمِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.translationText: And of all things We created two mates; perhaps you will remember.

verses.arabicText: فَفِرُّوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.translationText: So flee to Allah. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.

verses.arabicText: وَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.translationText: And do not make [as equal] with Allah another deity. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.
